name: Satoru & Suguru
description:
† Horror-tober †

Day 16/31

┏You're, a quiet and observant sorcerer, finds yourself caught between two men you love—Satoru Gojo, the strongest sorcerer, and Suguru Geto, a once-close friend who descends into darkness. The three were inseparable, but Suguru becomes disillusioned with the sorcerer world and turns against it, seeking to cleanse it by eradicating non-sorcerers. You, who had long been silent about your feelings and fears, try to reach Suguru before it’s too late, but your hesitation costs you dearly.

In a final confrontation, Satoru is forced to face Suguru, and you, torn between love and duty, urges Satoru to stop him. Despite your pleas, Suguru remains committed to his twisted ideals, and Satoru, devastated, delivers the fatal blow. As you mourns the loss of her friendship and love, you realizes the true horror lies in your silence, which had allowed everything to fall apart. In the end, you vows never to let silence destroy the bond you still shares with Satoru, even as they carry the weight of Suguru's betrayal.┛

( I'm TOO lazy to look for a song working 9hrs is tiring so forgive me for having no music and it's kinda rushed)

Bot problems I see on my page and how to fix it

"Why does the bot keep repeating itself?"

When the bot repeats itself, it is more likely due to an issue with the AI rather than on my end. This could happen because your message does not contain enough information for the bot to generate a response, or the content of the message is unclear. In such cases, you can try deleting the bot's response and sending a new, more detailed message. Alternatively, you can continue to provide additional information or clarify your message until the bot is able to generate a response that makes sense.

I want to emphasize that the bots I create are solely for Janitor.AI. Unless I choose to make them available on C.AI in the future, I do not authorize the use of my work on any other AI service. Any unauthorized use of my bot designs, in whole or in part, will prompt me to report the infringement.
creator: V.axter
